title: Director's Cut: Funded Trading Plus – Final Call for 20% OFF!
description: The curtain is about to fall on an epic 20% discount from Funded Trading Plus. Seize this final opportunity to elevate your trading journey.
seo_content:
Funded Trading Plus 20% OFF Final Call Deal

Funded Trading Plus is issuing a final-call 20% discount on both challenge and instant funding accounts. Use code 20INSTANT for instant funding accounts or 20CHAL for challenge accounts to lock in this limited-time saving. At 20% off, this is the steepest discount Funded Trading Plus has made available and represents the last window to enter at this reduced rate before the promotion closes on March 6, 2026.

Funded Trading Plus is a UK-based proprietary trading firm best known for pioneering the static drawdown model — a system where your maximum loss threshold is fixed from account inception and never rises as you profit. This structural innovation makes the firm particularly popular among disciplined traders who want the psychological security of a predictable, unchanging risk boundary throughout their evaluation and funded trading career.

With codes 20INSTANT or 20CHAL, you access a full 20% reduction on either path to funding: the traditional evaluation challenge or the instant funded account option. The instant path skips the evaluation entirely and delivers direct access to a funded environment, making the 20INSTANT code ideal for experienced traders who want to start trading funded capital without a challenge phase. Both options benefit from the static drawdown protection and DXTrade platform access.

Funded Trading Plus's trading conditions are consistently applied across both challenge and instant accounts: defined profit targets (for challenges), fixed drawdown limits on all accounts, forex and CFD instrument access, and reliable payouts through established processing channels. The UK institutional backing and track record of consistent payouts make this a low-risk firm to work with.

To claim your discount before the March 6, 2026 deadline, visit Funded Trading Plus via the affiliate link above, select either a challenge or instant funding account, and apply 20CHAL or 20INSTANT respectively at checkout. The 20% discount will reduce your total immediately. Do not delay — this is a final-call promotion with a hard expiry date.
